description: Hierarchical location management for organizing where inventory is physically stored. Locations follow a tree structure: warehouse → zone → aisle → shelf → bin. Each item can be assigned to a location. Stock can be transferred between locations (creating transfer-type movements). A locations page at /app/locations shows the location tree, per-location inventory summaries, and allows CRUD on locations. The catalog can be filtered by location. Admin and Manager can create/edit/delete locations. All roles can browse.

stories.title: Location tree data and hooks
stories.description: Create src/hooks/useLocations.ts — data hooks for locations. useLocations() returns flat list with parent_id for tree building. useLocationTree() returns nested tree structure. useCreateLocation, useUpdateLocation, useDeleteLocation mutation hooks. Each location has: id, name, type (warehouse/zone/aisle/shelf/bin), parent_id (nullable), description, is_active. Demo mode reads/writes from DemoStore locations array.
acceptanceCriteria: CRUD mutation hooks work with demo store
Location types: warehouse, zone, aisle, shelf, bin

verification.test: Import and call useLocations in a test component. Verify seed data returns 3 locations with correct hierarchy. No console errors.

stories.notes: Updated Location type with parentId, description, LocationType. Hierarchical seed data (3 warehouses, zones, aisles). DemoStore CRUD. useLocations, useLocationTree hooks with buildTree. Mutation hooks added.

stories.title: Location tree view component
stories.description: Create src/components/locations/LocationTree.tsx — a collapsible tree view showing the location hierarchy. Each node shows: location name, type badge (color-coded: warehouse=teal, zone=blue, aisle=purple, shelf=amber, bin=gray), item count (number of items at this location), and expand/collapse toggle for parent nodes. Indentation by depth level. Click a node to select it (highlights). Selected location shown in a detail panel. Empty state: 'No locations configured yet.'
acceptanceCriteria: Tree renders hierarchical locations with indentation

verification.test: Enter demo mode, /app/locations. Tree shows seed locations in hierarchy. Expand/collapse works. Type badges colored. Click a node — highlighted. Item counts shown. No console errors.

stories.notes: Collapsible tree with type badges, item counts, selection highlight, expand/collapse. Added Locations to sidebar nav. Created basic page route.

stories.title: Location create/edit form
stories.description: Create src/components/locations/LocationFormSheet.tsx — a Sheet for creating/editing locations. Fields: Name (required), Type (select: warehouse/zone/aisle/shelf/bin), Parent Location (select from existing locations, filtered by valid parent types — warehouse can't be inside a bin), Description (textarea), Active toggle. Type constrains parent options: warehouse has no parent, zone must be in warehouse, aisle in zone, shelf in aisle, bin in shelf. Zod validation. Admin/Manager only.
acceptanceCriteria: Parent select filtered by valid hierarchy

verification.test: Enter demo mode. Create new warehouse (no parent) — saved. Create zone inside it — parent dropdown shows only warehouses. Try creating zone with no parent — validation. Edit location — pre-filled. No console errors.

stories.notes: LocationFormSheet with Zod validation, hierarchy-constrained parent select, create/edit modes. Wired into page with New Location button. Admin/Manager gated.

stories.title: Location inventory summary
stories.description: Create src/components/locations/LocationSummary.tsx — shown when a location is selected in the tree. Displays: location name, type, full path (Warehouse > Zone > Aisle), description, item count, total inventory value (sum of qty × cost for items at this location). Compact item list showing top 10 items at this location with name, SKU, qty, status badge. 'View All in Catalog' link to /app/catalog?location=ID. For parent locations, aggregates include all children.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows location details and full path
Top 10 items with name, SKU, qty, status
View All link to catalog filtered by location

verification.test: Enter demo mode. Select a location with items — summary shows details, item list, value. Select parent location — aggregates children. Select empty location — empty state. 'View All' links to catalog. No console errors.

stories.notes: LocationSummary component with full path, item count, total value, top 10 items, parent aggregation via getDescendantIds. Wired into locations page with findNode helper.

stories.title: Stock transfer between locations
stories.description: Create src/components/locations/TransferStockSheet.tsx — a Sheet for transferring stock between locations. Fields: Item (searchable select, pre-filled if opened from location summary), From Location (select), To Location (select, cannot equal From), Quantity (number, min 1, max available at From location). On submit: creates a stock movement with type 'transferred', from_location and to_location fields. Updates item's location_id if fully transferred. Toast confirmation. Admin/Manager only.
acceptanceCriteria: Sheet with item, from, to, quantity fields
From and To cannot be the same location
Quantity constrained to available at From location
Item location_id updated if fully transferred
Pre-fills item when opened from location context

verification.test: Enter demo mode. Open transfer form. Select item, from location, to location (different), enter valid qty. Submit — movement created. Check movements page — transfer type movement exists. Try same from/to — validation error. No console errors.

stories.notes: TransferStockSheet with item/from/to/qty fields, Zod validation, auto-fill from location on item select, creates Transferred movement. DemoStore updated to handle Transferred type by updating locationId.

stories.title: Delete location with safety checks
stories.description: Add delete action for locations (admin only). Before deletion, check: if location has items, show warning 'This location has X items. They will become unassigned.' If location has children, prevent deletion: 'Cannot delete a location with sub-locations. Remove or move children first.' AlertDialog confirmation. Successful delete removes location and unsets location_id on affected items.

verification.test: Enter demo mode (admin). Try deleting location with children — blocked. Try deleting leaf location with items — warning shown, confirm — deleted, items unassigned. No console errors.

stories.notes: LocationDeleteDialog with AlertDialog. Blocks deletion if children exist. Warns about item count. Unassigns items on confirm. Admin-only via delete_item permission. Integrated into LocationTree with hover-reveal trash icon.

stories.title: Locations page composition
stories.description: Compose the full /app/locations page in src/routes/app.locations.tsx. Layout: header with 'Locations' heading, location count, '+ New Location' and 'Transfer Stock' buttons (admin/manager). Two-panel layout: left panel with LocationTree (40% width), right panel with LocationSummary (60% width). On mobile: single column, tree above summary. Page title 'Locations — Stackwise'.
acceptanceCriteria: Page heading with count and action buttons
Two-panel layout: tree left, summary right

verification.test: Enter demo mode, /app/locations. Page renders with tree and summary panels. Click location — summary updates. Click New Location — form opens. Click Transfer — transfer form opens. Resize to mobile — stacks. No console errors.

stories.notes: Page already fully composed from prior stories. Verified: two-panel layout, mobile stacking via lg:grid-cols, both sheets open, requestor role hides action buttons.
